title: How to Invest in Property in Tamil Nadu in 2025
author: S.S. Ponnarasan
excerpt: Thinking about investing in Tamil Nadu real estate? Here is everything you need to know before making your first move.
content:
Why Tamil Nadu's Real Estate Market is Booming

Tamil Nadu consistently ranks high for industrial growth and quality of living. Investing in property here in 2025 requires understanding of RERA compliance and local zoning laws.

Key Investment Zones

  • Chennai suburbs (OMR & ECR)
  • Coimbatore industrial plots
  • Madurai cultural hubs

title: Complete Checklist Before Starting Home Construction in Tamil Nadu
author: S.S. Ponnarasan
excerpt: Before breaking ground on your new home, make sure you have these essentials covered.
content:
Starting Your Dream Home Right

The tropical climate of Tamil Nadu means special considerations are needed for material choices and land preparation.

The Mandatory Checklist

  • Check DTCP/CMDA approvals
  • Conduct soil testing and structural planning
  • Secure specialized weather-resistant cement
  • Hire a reliable contractor

Our team at Sky Groups handles everything from blueprint to handover. Explore our Civil Construction expertise.

title: Top Tips for Buying Used Cars in Tamil Nadu
author: S.S. Ponnarasan
excerpt: Avoid common pitfalls and find the best pre-owned vehicles with these insider tips.
content:
The Used Vehicle Market

Buying a second-hand vehicle can save you significant money, provided you check the history and mechanics correctly.

What to Audit

  • Full service history records
  • Under-body rust (crucial in coastal areas like Chennai)
  • Valid RC and Insurance transfers

title: How to Sell Your Agricultural Land Faster
author: S.S. Ponnarasan
excerpt: Clear legal documentation and proper valuation are keys to liquidating land assets quickly.
content:
Optimizing Your Land Sale

Agricultural land transactions in Tamil Nadu require specific checks regarding patta, chitta, and encumbrance certificates.

Steps to Success

  • Ensure boundaries are clearly fenced
  • Clear all property tax dues
  • Have legal documents thoroughly verified

title: Choosing the Right Construction Materials for Tamil Nadu's Climate
author: S.S. Ponnarasan
excerpt: To ensure your building stands the test of time, you must select climate-appropriate materials.
content:
Combating Heat and Humidity

High humidity and blazing summers require specific structural choices for homes in Tamil Nadu.

Recommended Materials

  • Porotherm bricks for thermal insulation
  • Weather-proof exterior grade paints
  • Anti-corrosive TMT bars

title: How to Choose the Right Event Management Company
author: S.S. Ponnarasan
excerpt: Do not leave your important day to chance. Here is how to vet an event planner.
content:
Vetting the Professionals

A good event manager stays invisible while the event shines.

Questions to Ask

  • Can I see a portfolio of past events?
  • What is your contingency plan for emergencies?
  • Are vendor deposits refundable?
